index.title: PEACEWAY PAJU Paju | DMZ Peace Tree Planting & Sustainable Tourism
index.description: Official PEACEWAY PAJU in Paju, South Korea: plant peace flowering trees in the DMZ border area, join a mine safety training experience, and explore Korean culture through sustainable tourism. Bookings for international visitors.

about.title: About PEACEWAY PAJU | DMZ Peace Footsteps Farm & Partners
about.description: Meet the DMZ Peace Footsteps Farm, Korea Mine Research Institute, and 벼꽃피는마을 (Byeo-kkot-pineun Maeul)—the partners and venues behind PEACEWAY PAJU peace tourism in Paju.

programs.title: PEACEWAY PAJU Programs | DMZ Tree Planting & mine safety training experience
programs.description: Reserve DMZ peace tree planting, peace history learning, mine safety training experience, and Korean cultural workshops in Paju. Schedules, group sizes, and what to expect for visitors.

journey.title: Visitor Journey | PEACEWAY PAJU DMZ Day in Paju
journey.description: Full itinerary from booking to mine safety training experience, tree planting, culture at 벼꽃피는마을 (Byeo-kkot-pineun Maeul), and online registration—times and flow for your DMZ visit.

garden.title: Peace Garden Trees | PEACEWAY PAJU DMZ Bloom Guide
garden.description: Guide to peace flowering trees in the DMZ Peace Garden: meanings, bloom seasons, and a four-season calendar to plan your PEACEWAY PAJU visit to Paju.

contact.title: Book & Contact | PEACEWAY PAJU DMZ Tours Paju
contact.description: Request a DMZ program booking or quote, read FAQs on safety and access, and contact PEACEWAY PAJU. Civilian Control Zone visits require advance reservation.

patent.title: AI Tourism Interpretation | PEACEWAY PAJU Patent-Pending Platform
patent.description: PEACEWAY PAJU’s real-time AI interpretation and translation for multilingual DMZ tourism—patent-pending technology for guides and international groups.

hero.tagline: Planting Trees of Peace on the DMZ Minefields
hero.desc:
A sustainable tourism experience in the DMZ border area where visitors from around the world plant peace flowering trees with their own hands
and discover Korean culture.

pillar1.title: Plant trees
pillar1.desc: Plant peace flowering trees directly on DMZ land. A truly one-of-a-kind experience in the world.

pillar2.title: Record peace
pillar2.desc: Your tree is permanently registered online, and you can follow its growth over time.

pillar3.title: Learn history
pillar3.desc: Experience the reality of division firsthand through a peace history education program.

compare.c12: Write a wish on a ribbon

compare.c63: DMZ Civilian Control Zone farm (restricted area)

cta.title: Join us in planting trees of peace
cta.subtitle: Until the former minefields of the DMZ bloom into gardens.

compare.quote:
"Ribbons may be carried away by the wind,
but trees put down roots."

about.label: About
about.title: Why plant trees in the DMZ?
about.subtitle: Planting a symbol of peace with your own hands on a site marked by conflict. That is where PEACEWAY begins.

partner1.name: K-MIND
partner1.desc: Overall planning, online platform, DMZ farm ownership and management

partner2.name: 벼꽃피는마을 (Byeo-kkot-pineun Maeul)
partner2.desc: Operation of the offline experience venue, local agricultural cultivation, and cultural experience programs

partner3.name: Korea Mine Research Institute
partner3.desc: Operation of mine education and experience programs, and overall safety management

about.calloutBody: Viewed from above, this footprint-shaped piece of DMZ land is a symbolic space that leaves behind “footsteps of peace.” Inside the Civilian Control Zone, in a place that is not easily accessible to the public, people from around the world plant trees here.
about.spaceBody:
DMZ Peace Footsteps Farm — Located inside the Civilian Control Zone in Paju, Gyeonggi-do. It is farmland operated with military approval and belongs to a special restricted-access area. Travel time: about 30 minutes by car from Paju city center.

벼꽃피는마을 (Byeo-kkot-pineun Maeul) — A rural experience venue in Paju. A warm village space where cultural programs such as K-bibimbap and mother-of-pearl craft are offered.

programs.label: Programs
programs.title: 🌳 Experience Programs
programs.subtitle: Discover a one-of-a-kind peace tourism program that can only be experienced in the DMZ.
programs.treeLead: A world-first experience — plant flowering trees directly on DMZ land. Your tree will be permanently registered online, and you will be able to track its growth.
programs.treeCalloutHtml:
Three reasons this program is special
🌍 One of a kind — Plant a tree directly on DMZ land
📱 Permanent record — Track your tree’s growth online
🇰🇷 Historic significance — Plant the golden rain tree, a symbol of the inter-Korean summit, in the DMZ
programs.mineTitle: 💣 Peace history education — mine safety training experience
programs.mineLead: An educational program that helps you understand the reality of division firsthand. Learn the meaning of peace through safe training mine replicas and metal detectors.
programs.mineWarnHtml: ⚠️ Safety Notice: Only safe training mine replicas are used for educational purposes. Partner: Korea Mine Research Institute
programs.mineF2: How to use a metal detector
programs.mineTipHtml: 💡 Recommended flow: Right after the peace history education experience → plant a tree next door (creating a flower garden while wishing for world peace)
programs.culture1p: Make your own bibimbap using local produce from Paju. Choose fresh ingredients yourself and create a bibimbap that is uniquely yours.
programs.culture2p: A special experience where you make and taste North Korean dishes such as injo-gogi-bap and corn rice cakes. Understand the reality of division in the DMZ through food.
programs.culture3p: Create phone cases, keychains, and hand mirrors using traditional mother-of-pearl decoration. Experience the beauty of Korean traditional craft with your own hands.

journey.label: Journey
journey.title: 🗺️ Visitor Journey
journey.subtitle: A day in the DMZ, a journey of planting peace.
journey.s1p: Select your program and request your preferred date
journey.s2h: Peace history education — mine safety training experience
journey.s2p: Learn about DMZ history + use a metal detector + observe mine replicas
journey.s3p: Choose a flowering tree → plant it → record your message → take photos
journey.s4p: K-bibimbap / North Korean food / mother-of-pearl craft (choose 1–2)
journey.s5p: Tree information + peace message permanently registered online
journey.s6p: Follow your tree after returning home (phase 2 updates)
journey.totalHtml: 🕐 Total duration: about 4–5 hours  |  Meeting point: designated location in Paju  |  What to bring: comfortable clothes, a hat

garden.label: Peace Garden
garden.title: 🌸 Guide to Peace Flowering Trees
garden.subtitle: Flowering trees planted in the DMZ Peace Garden. Each tree carries its own story of peace.
garden.tree1peace: Symbolic tree of the inter-Korean summit
garden.tree2peace: National flower of Korea — a resilient will for peace
garden.tree3peace: A symbol of peace recognized by the United Nations
garden.tree5peace: The hope that announces the arrival of spring
garden.tree6peace: A tree of peace that wishes for a rich harvest
garden.calLead: The trees available for planting vary depending on the season of your visit.
garden.ctaHtml: 💡 Planning to visit now? Check which trees can currently be planted and which flowers are in bloom, then book your program.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: 📬 Inquiries · Booking
contact.subtitle: Please contact us for program bookings or any questions you may have. We will reply within 2 business days.

form.name: Name *
form.notePh: Feel free to write any questions you may have
form.footnote: After submission, we will respond by email within 2 business days

formFeedback.valName: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
formFeedback.valEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
formFeedback.valPrograms: Please select at least one program.
formFeedback.valMessage: If you enter a message in the additional questions field, please write at least 10 characters.
formFeedback.success: Your inquiry has been received. We will get back to you soon.

contact.cardKakaoL: Go to the PEACEWAY PAJU channel
contact.cardMapHtml:
Civilian Control Zone near the DMZ, Paju, Gyeonggi-do
Detailed directions will be provided after booking confirmation
contact.faq1a: Yes. This program was designed for international visitors. However, because it takes place inside the Civilian Control Zone, advance booking and ID verification are required.
contact.faq2a: Basic English guidance is provided, and professional interpretation can be arranged for group bookings. An AI real-time interpretation and translation system is also planned.
contact.faq3q: Q. How much is the participation fee?
contact.faq3a: Pricing varies depending on the program combination and the number of participants. A detailed quotation will be provided through the inquiry form.
contact.faq4q: Q. Is the mine safety training experience safe?
contact.faq4a: Completely safe. Only training mine replicas are used for the mine safety training experience, and safety is overseen by experts from the Korea Mine Research Institute.
contact.faq5q: Q. Can I check on the tree I planted later?
contact.faq5a: Yes. Once the online tracking system is built in phase 2, you will be able to check your tree through GPS location data and growth photos.
contact.faq6a: Yes. We welcome group bookings for 10 or more participants, and tailored programs can be arranged for corporate workshops, school field trips, and more.
contact.faq7q: Q. Does the program continue in the rain?
contact.faq7a: In light rain, the program will proceed with rain gear provided. In severe weather, the schedule will be changed.
contact.faq8a: Children aged 7 and above may participate when accompanied by a guardian.
contact.faq9a: You may use the designated parking area near the experience site. Detailed directions will be provided after booking confirmation.
contact.faq10q: Q. How do we get there?
contact.faq10a: It takes about 30 minutes by car from central Paju. Since prior approval is required to enter the Civilian Control Zone, detailed transportation guidance will be provided at the time of booking. Shuttle service is also available for groups.

patent.label: Technology
patent.title: 🌐 AI Real-Time Interpretation & Translation Tourism Platform
patent.subtitle: An innovation being prepared by PEACEWAY PAJU — the future of peace tourism without language barriers
patent.patentTitle: AI Real-Time Two-Way Simultaneous Interpretation Tourism Guide Platform
patent.patentEn: Method and system for providing tourism information to foreign tourists in two directions using a group chat platform equipped with artificial intelligence interpretation and translation functions
patent.calloutGoldHtml: The world’s first group-tour interpretation and translation system in which one guide provides tour information in each visitor’s native language through AI-powered real-time, two-way simultaneous interpretation for tourists from multiple countries.
patent.f1p: The guide’s Korean-language explanation is converted in real time into text and voice in each visitor’s native language
patent.f2p: A group chat room where messages written by tourists in their own languages are translated for one another in real time
patent.f3p: A self-learning system that optimizes interpretation quality using AI engines such as GPT and Gemini
patent.f4p: Each visitor receives guidance in their own language through a smartphone and earphones
patent.downloadAria: Download links for the App Store on iOS and the Play Store on Android
patent.downloadLinkTitleApp: The iOS App Store link will be available soon
patent.downloadLinkTitlePlay: The Android Play Store link will be available soon
patent.bottomHtml:
🌍 PEACEWAY PAJU × AI Interpretation & Translation
Once this technology is applied, more than 30 nationalities participating in the DMZ peace tourism program will be able to receive real-time tour information in their own languages from a single guide. Real-time conversation across languages among tourists will also become possible.
